codeReview.summary: The NoveltyChecker implementation fully satisfies the feature requirements. It provides similarity scoring using Levenshtein distance (85% threshold) and file overlap analysis (50% threshold) to reject duplicate tasks. The implementation includes 24 comprehensive unit tests covering all edge cases including failure-derived task exemption from description similarity checks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation follows documented Rust patterns: uses tracing for logging, async_trait conventions, proper error handling with Result types. No issues found.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: novelty_check.rs uses tracing::{debug, info} and follows AGENTS.md conventions

summary: Feature orch-novelty-check passes review. The NoveltyChecker in crates/swell-orchestrator/src/novelty_check.rs implements duplicate task rejection using Levenshtein similarity scoring (85% threshold) and file overlap analysis (50% threshold). All 24 unit tests pass. The implementation correctly handles failure-derived tasks by exempting them from description similarity checks while still checking file overlap. No code issues found.
